metadata.name: Calculate and Post a Goods Received Not Invoiced (GRNI) Accrual

description: For month-end close, an accountant needs to create an accrual for goods that have been received but for which no supplier invoice has been processed yet.

nodes.task_description: Run a report of all open purchase order lines where goods have been received but an invoice has not been posted.
Calculate the total value of the items on the GRNI report.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calculates the total accrual amount.

nodes.task_description: Create and post a journal entry to debit the relevant expense/inventory accounts and credit 'AP Accruals'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent posts the correct month-end accrual entry.
